summary_en: 500,000 shares acquired on May 15, 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 for ¥938M (0.74% of shares outstanding). Execution completed under authorization granted May 14, 2026 for up to 500,000 shares and ¥1.0B through September 30, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Shares via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Maeda Kosen completed acquisition of 500,000 treasury shares on May 15, 2026 via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange for an aggregate consideration of ¥938 million. The acquisition was authorized by the board of directors on May 14, 2026, which approved a program to acquire up to 500,000 shares (representing 0.74% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥1.0 billion. The authorized execution window runs from May 15 through September 30, 2026. This notice announces that the May 15 block transaction has settled and that all acquisitions under the May 14 board resolution have been completed.
